page_text: Official University of Bristol scholarship page for 2026/27 entry. International Master's applicants can apply for the Global Masters Scholarship. Awards cover 50 percent of tuition and include a living stipend. Applications close on 31 May 2026.

rules.evidence_text: Official page states awards are for 2026/27 entry.

rules.requirement_text: Open to students from any non-UK country.
rules.evidence_text: Official page states students from any non-UK country may apply.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant may be resident outside the UK.
rules.evidence_text: Official page says overseas applicants are eligible.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant must be classed as overseas for fee purposes.
rules.evidence_text: Official page requires overseas fee status.
Official page lists eligible taught Master's programmes.
Official page includes Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence taught programmes.

rules.requirement_text: Award covers at least 40 percent funding need.
rules.evidence_text: Official page states award covers 50 percent of tuition and includes a living stipend.

rules.requirement_text: Deadline is open for the intake.
rules.evidence_text: Official page states applications close on 31 May 2026.
Official page says applicants submit the scholarship form after receiving a programme offer.
